title: selaginella densa
intro: Selaginella densa, also known as Spike Moss, is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its dense, spiky foliage. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Spike Moss include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Selaginella densa can be found in the form of tea, capsules, or extracts, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
